CustomField.formula: IF( RecordType.Name = 'Billing', IF( OR( ISPICKVAL(Onboarding_Attempt_Status_New__c, "Closed"), ISPICKVAL(Onboarding_Attempt_Status_New__c, "Canceled") ), Billing_Verify_Complet_Stage_Met_Stamp__c, IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Billing_Verify_Complet_Stage_Met_Stamp__c)), Billing_Verify_Complet_Stage_Met_Stamp__c, DATEVALUE(Account__r.School_Object__r.Billing_FinalVerification_Stage_Met_Date__c) ) ), NULL )
CustomField.label: Billing Verify Complete Stage Met Date
